de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst

Class ContextStatementBlockInstantiation

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst.ContextStatementBlockInstantiation

  • public class ContextStatementBlockInstantiation
extends Object
    this class is created if the scheme given by a context term has matched to a java program. The ContextStatementBlockInstantiation class stores the instantiations of the prefix and the suffix.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private ExecutionContext activeStatementContext
      the execution context of the first active statement
      private PosInProgram prefixEnd
      the end position of the prefix omega
      private ProgramElement programElement
      the whole program element this context term inst refers to
      private PosInProgram suffixStart
      the start position of the suffix omega

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ContextStatementBlockInstantiation(PosInProgram prefixEnd, PosInProgram suffixStart, ExecutionContext activeStatementContext, ProgramElement pe)
      creates a ContextStatementBlockInstantiation of a context term

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ExecutionContext activeStatementContext()
      returns the execution context of the first active statement or null if match is performed outer most

      returns the end position of the prefix

      returns the PosInProgram describing the statement just before the suffix begins

    • Field Detail

      • prefixEnd

        private PosInProgram prefixEnd
        the end position of the prefix omega

        private ProgramElement programElement
        the whole program element this context term inst refers to

    • Constructor Detail

      • ContextStatementBlockInstantiation

        public ContextStatementBlockInstantiation(PosInProgram prefixEnd,
                                          PosInProgram suffixStart,
                                          ExecutionContext activeStatementContext,
                                          ProgramElement pe)
        creates a ContextStatementBlockInstantiation of a context term
        Parameters:
        prefixEnd - the PosInProgram describing the first statement after the end of the prefix
        suffixStart - the PosInProgram describing the statement just before the suffix begins
        activeStatementContext - the ExecutionContext of the first active statement
        pe - the ProgramElement the context positions are related to

    • Method Detail

      • prefix

        public PosInProgram prefix()
        returns the end position of the prefix
        Returns:
        the end position of the prefix

      • suffix

        public PosInProgram suffix()
        returns the PosInProgram describing the statement just before the suffix begins

      • activeStatementContext

        public ExecutionContext activeStatementContext()
        returns the execution context of the first active statement or null if match is performed outer most

      • programElement

        public ProgramElement programElement()
        returns the program element this context term instantiation refers to
        Returns:
        returns the program element this context term instantiation refers to
